title: Lofi Music discs
description: Adds soothing, lo-fi tunes into your Minecraft world. Crafted from diamonds, coal, and dye.  Each disc offers a distinct, relaxing atmosphere. So sit back and enjoy lofi relaxation
body:
The Lo-Fi Music Discs Mod adds a collection of unique music discs that play soothing, lo-fi tunes in your Minecraft world. Craft these special music disks from the recipes shown in the gallary tab.

Each disc offers a distinct, atmospheric soundtrack to enhance your gameplay experience. Sit back, relax, and let the mellow melodies transport you to a peaceful, lo-fi state of mind. (Disc recipes in gallery tab)

------
  
All the songs in this mod are made by me. The mod is in a completed state enjoy! 
Please get my permission if you're going to use this mod in a modpack

you can contact me here
